mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_shipment (order_id, shipment_no, tracking_no, courier_name, shipment_status, shipped_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{shipmentNo}, #{trackingNo}, #{courierName}, #{shipmentStatus}, #{shippedAt})
INSERT INTO tb_shipment_line (shipment_id, order_line_id, shipped_qty) VALUES (#{shipmentId}, #{orderLineId}, #{shippedQty})
